pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: DynamoDB NoSQL implements security group rules and access controls. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Infrastructure as Code ensures consistent, repeatable deployments of DynamoDB NoSQL.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Configurable resource sizing allows teams to match capacity to actual workload requirements.
